case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS TAYECH, LEMA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYECH, LEMA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT TAYECH, LEMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYECH, LEMA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDANCE FROM TIGIST TADESSE TO COURT RECEIVED AND FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-06-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STIPULATION.
